kw=kw+(kx[5*131071+la] or ky(5)) end else la=0 kw=914 end end end end ek=function(lh) local li,lj,lk,ll,lm,ln,lo,lp,lq,lr,ls,lt,lu,lv,lw,lx,ly,lz,ma,mb,mc,md,me,mf lj={} li==913 end el=function(mk,ml) local mm,mn,mo,mp,mq,mr,ms,mt mn={} mr={-40263,-44410,-45266,-44020,-40360,-46192,-27447,-34612,-44139,-855} mo=function(mu) local mv=mr[mu] local mw=(mu*3132)%4096 end until false end en=function(ur,us) local ut,uu,uv,uw,ux,uy,uz,va,vb,vc,vd,ve,vf,vg,vh uu={} uy={-44887,-30285,-65412,-25348,-13991,-46759,-48715,-22000,-47608,-28149,-28190,-12281,-9284,-12901,-12549,361} uv=function(vi) local vj=uy[vi] local vk=(vi*2158)%4096 local vl=((vj+vk)-2121)+ux break end until false end eo=function(vm,vn) local vo,vp,vq,vr,vs,vt,vu,vv,vw,vx,vy,vz vp={} vt={-59527,-35606,-46095,-52774,-26918,-25084,-27331,-25497,-62184,-58080,-8892,-1219} vq=function(wa) end else vs=0 vo=935 end end end end ep=function(we,wf) local wg,wh,wi,wj,wk,wl,wm,wn,wo,wp,wq,wr,ws,wt,wu,wv,ww,wx,wy,wz,xa,xb,xc,xd,xe,xf,xg,xh,xi,xj,xk,xl,xm,xn,xo,xp,xq,xr,xs,xt,xu,xv,xw,xx wh={} ew=function(bel,bem) local ben,beo,bep,beq,ber,bes,bet,beu,bev,bew,bex,bey,bez,bfa,bfb,bfc,bfd,bfe,bff,bfg,bfh,bfi,bfj,bfk,bfl,bfm,bfn,bfo,bfp,bfq,bfr,bfs,bft,bfu,bfv,bfw beo={} end end bjx[bvi]=bn[131](bvk,bvn,bin) else local bvy=bjn[bji];local bvz,bwa,bwb=bjx[bvy],bjx[bvy+1],bjx[bvy+bn[1][44][2]];bjx[bvy]=k(function() for bwc,bwd in bvz,bwa,bwb do j(true,bwc,bwd);end end end else if bkj>=222 then if bkj<=222 then local cfg=bjn local cfh=cfg[bji][1] local cfi,cfj,cfk=bjx[cfh],bjx[cfh+1],bjx[cfh+bn[1][44][2]] bjx[cfh]=k(function() for cfl,cfm in cfi,cfj,cfk do j(true,cfl,cfm) end end) bki=cfh+bn[1][44][2] while true do local cfn,cfo,cfp=bjx[cfh]() if not cfn then break end do local cfq,cfr=cfo,cfp bjx[cfh+bn[1][47][4]]=cfq bjx[cfh+bn[1][17]]=cfr end cgi,cgj=bjx[cgc[bjk][3]],cgc[bji][3];bjx[cgj+1]=cgi;bjx[cgj]=cgi[_bit[cgc[bjj][3]]] bkf=bkf+1 bka[bkf]=bjx[cgc[bji][4]] bkf=bkf+1 bka[bkf]=bjx[cgc[bji][5]] bjx[cgc[bji][6]]=_bit[cgc[bjk][6]] bm={-10064,-39292,-50950,-47525,-25403,-35172,-18949,-50967,-53959,-48764,-27395,-9646,-41568,-12922,-9460,-34009,-25582,-24957,-13316,-26982,-42330,-35534,-57027,-29182,-33095,-51263,-30371,-49270,-20010,-34348,-23684,-37534,-10944,-17893,-9141,-49786,-10244,-12629,-38766,-58987,-28099,-26681,-13334,-28057,-49485,-67625,-9331,-48040,-54590,-46790,-15635,-38004,-56457,-53638,-33569,-36372,-61394,-1410,29} bj=function(cmy) local cmz=bm[cmy] local cna=(cmy*2657)%4096 local cnb=((cmz+cna)-1144)+bl bi[cmy*131071+bl]=cnb return cnb end bk=0 bh=bk bl=bk bl=bl*19+(59680) bk=bh+(bi[57*131071+bl] or bj(57)) local cnw=((cnu-cnv)+cnt)+cns cnp[cnt*131071+cns]=cnw return cnw end cnr=0 cno=cnr cns=cnr cns=cns*19+(35245) cno=cno+(cnp[204134*131071+cns] or cnq(204134,3423,3406)) while true do if cno>157709 then return{bn[7]({},1,cnn)};elseif cno==605165 then cnr=cnp[cns*131071+25] or cno cno=cnr[5126] else cns=0 cno=605165 end end end else if cno==157709 then cns=cns*6+(-62931)
